title: Evangelion Equipment (Rebuild)
wikitext:
''For the ''[[Neon Genesis Evangelion]]'' continuity, please see: [[Evangelion Equipment]].''

{{Construction}} ==G-Type Equipment== [[Image:Eva1.11-C1508B 04.jpg|thumb|200px|left|G-type Equipment]] Specialized sniper equipment fitted to Eva-01 in [[Evangelion 1.0]]. Used in conjunction with the [[Evangelion_Ranged_Weapons (Rebuild)#Positron_Sniper_Rifle|Positron Sniper Rifle]] in Operation Yashima. {{-}} ==S-Type Equipment (Aerial Recon)== {{MontageBox |float = none |columns = 2 |colour = |image1 = [[Image:Eva2-22 C0139.jpg|200px]] |image2 = [[Image:Eva2-22 C0167 a.jpg|200px]] |caption = S-Type Equipment, notice the modified arm fins. }} Specialized equipment for aerial raid. It consists of what looks like a giant jetpack fixed on the Evangelion shoulder in the place of the shoulder pylons and modified arm fins, presumably for direction. Eva-02 is seen in [[Evangelion 2.0]] dropping from a flying wing and carrying an [[Evangelion_Ranged_Weapons (Rebuild)#Super-Electromagnetic_Crossbow_MM-144|Electromagnetic Crossbow]] to attack the [[Seventh Angel]]. ==Enchanted Shield of Virtue (ESV)== {{needpics}} An Eva-sized shield used to deflect high-energy attacks for an extended period of time. Utilized by Eva-00 during Operation Yashima to provide cover for Eva-01 against the Sixth Angel's heavy particle cannon. In the post-Third Impact world, the ESV appears to have been subject to mass production, and Wille has replicas equipped to the bottoms of the Iowa Class battleships used to give Eva-08 backup during the [[Paris Assault Mission]]. These help shield the landing team from Eva 4444C's positron cannon until Eva-08 is able to bring the enemy unit down. The name appears to be a reference to ''Sleeping Beauty'': "The road to true love may be barriered by still many more dangers, which you alone will have to face. So arm thyself with this enchanted Shield of Virtue, and this mighty Sword of Truth, for these Weapons of Righteousness will triumph over evil."{{fact}} {{Eva List Rebuild}} {{stub}}
html:
For the Neon Genesis Evangelion continuity, please see: Evangelion Equipment.



"We've seen it. The proof of its construction was very useful."
This article or section is under construction, and needs to be further expanded.
Please provide input on the talk page, or help build this page.


G-Type Equipment[edit]

Specialized sniper equipment fitted to Eva-01 in Evangelion 1.0. Used in conjunction with the Positron Sniper Rifle in Operation Yashima.

S-Type Equipment (Aerial Recon)[edit]

S-Type Equipment, notice the modified arm fins.

Specialized equipment for aerial raid. It consists of what looks like a giant jetpack fixed on the Evangelion shoulder in the place of the shoulder pylons and modified arm fins, presumably for direction. Eva-02 is seen in Evangelion 2.0 dropping from a flying wing and carrying an Electromagnetic Crossbow to attack the Seventh Angel.

Enchanted Shield of Virtue (ESV)[edit]

They say a picture is worth a thousand words...
 This article needs (more) images to illustrate some of the items discussed within and to keep it from being a barren, boring wasteland of text.
Please discuss this issue, or begin editing the page.

An Eva-sized shield used to deflect high-energy attacks for an extended period of time. Utilized by Eva-00 during Operation Yashima to provide cover for Eva-01 against the Sixth Angel's heavy particle cannon. In the post-Third Impact world, the ESV appears to have been subject to mass production, and Wille has replicas equipped to the bottoms of the Iowa Class battleships used to give Eva-08 backup during the Paris Assault Mission. These help shield the landing team from Eva 4444C's positron cannon until Eva-08 is able to bring the enemy unit down.

The name appears to be a reference to Sleeping Beauty: "The road to true love may be barriered by still many more dangers, which you alone will have to face. So arm thyself with this enchanted Shield of Virtue, and this mighty Sword of Truth, for these Weapons of Righteousness will triumph over evil."[Source needed]

This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!
summary: For the Neon Genesis Evangelion continuity, please see: Evangelion Equipment.

chunks.content:
For the Neon Genesis Evangelion continuity, please see: Evangelion Equipment.

G-Type Equipment
thumb|200px|left|G-type Equipment
Specialized sniper equipment fitted to Eva-01 in Evangelion 1.0. Used in conjunction with the Positron Sniper Rifle in Operation Yashima.

S-Type Equipment (Aerial Recon)

Specialized equipment for aerial raid. It consists of what looks like a giant jetpack fixed on the Evangelion shoulder in the place of the shoulder pylons and modified arm fins, presumably for direction. Eva-02 is seen in Evangelion 2.0 dropping from a flying wing and carrying an Electromagnetic Crossbow to attack the Seventh Angel. 

Enchanted Shield of Virtue (ESV)

An Eva-sized shield used to deflect high-energy attacks for an extended period of time. Utilized by Eva-00 during Operation Yashima to provide cover for Eva-01 against the Sixth Angel's heavy particle cannon. In the post-Third Impact world, the ESV appears to have been subject to mass production, and Wille has replicas equipped to the bottoms of the Iowa Class battleships used to give Eva-08 backup during the Paris Assault Mission. These help shield the landing team from Eva 4444C's positron cannon until Eva-08 is able to bring the enemy unit down. 

The name appears to be a reference to Sleeping Beauty: "The road to true love may be barriered by still many more dangers, which you alone will have to face. So arm thyself with this enchanted Shield of Virtue, and this mighty Sword of Truth, for these Weapons of Righteousness will triumph over evil."
